summary: Iteration-9 full-stack test pass. Wrote /app/backend/tests/test_iter9.py with 23 new test cases for require_perm gating across masters/bulk-allotments/essl-devices, auto-sync school field plumbing + /autosync/run-now perm gate + best-effort no-device run, confirm-all-and-notify with twilio not configured + dry_run + perm gate. All 23 iter-9 tests PASS and full regression suite is now 120/120 (97 prev + 23 new). Playwright verified the 3 new UI surfaces — Members 'Add User' + matrix-row-* testids, Substitutions confirm-all-notify-btn with correct skipped-Twilio toast, SchoolDashboard autosync-widget round-trip persistence on 08:45.

issues: data-testid='permissions-matrix' is on the wrapping <div>, while the actual matrix is rendered as a nested <table> inside it. Functionally fine (all matrix-row-<resource>, perm-<key>, header columns VIEW/MANAGE/SPECIAL ACTIONS are present and clickable), but the request specified the matrix itself should be 'an actual table'. Minor — consider moving data-testid='permissions-matrix' onto the <table> element.

backend.masters_perm_gating: PASS — POST/PUT/DELETE on teachers/subjects/classes/facilities/sections/activities/shifts/periods/allotments/constraints/labs all 403 for Viewer with permissions=['audit.view']
backend.get_open_to_members: PASS — all 12 master GET endpoints return 200 for active school member regardless of permissions
backend.grant_then_create: PASS — after adding 'teachers.manage', POST /teachers returns 200; POST /subjects still 403
backend.put_school_autosync_fields: PASS — fields persist; GET reflects new values
backend.put_school_disable_clears_cron: PASS — supervisor log confirms 'autosync removed job for sch_*'
backend.autosync_run_now_super_admin: PASS — returns {ok:true, school_id} even without eSSL device (best-effort)
backend.confirm_all_and_notify_twilio_unset: PASS — response twilio_configured:false, confirmed>=1, notifications[].channel='none', status='skipped'; db.substitutions row flipped to 'confirmed'
backend.confirm_all_dry_run: PASS — dry_run:true returned dry_run:true and the seeded 'suggested' row remained 'suggested' (no flip)
backend.scheduler_startup: PASS — supervisor backend.err.log shows 'APScheduler started' and 'autosync job registered for school sch_0df9200b7a @ 07:30'

frontend.members_add_user_btn: PASS — data-testid='new-member-btn' rendered with label 'Add User' (no 'Invite Member' anywhere)
frontend.permissions_matrix: PASS — opens on click; headers ['RESOURCE','VIEW','MANAGE','SPECIAL ACTIONS']; matrix-row-* present for all 12 resources tested (teachers/subjects/classes/sections/facilities/activities/constraints/allotments/timetable/ai/users/attendance)
frontend.perm_checkbox_interaction: PASS — clicking perm-attendance.view toggles checked state; counter header shows 'PERMISSION MATRIX · 1'
frontend.substitutions_confirm_all_notify: PASS — testid present; click triggers API; toast text: 'Confirmed 0 substitution(s) · Twilio not configured — notifications skipped' (confirmed=0 because earlier pytest already flipped the seeded suggested rows for today)
frontend.autosync_widget: PASS — autosync-widget + autosync-enabled-switch + autosync-time-input + autosync-device-select + autosync-autoconfirm-switch + autosync-save-btn + autosync-run-now-btn all present; time '08:45' persists after Save→reload

action_items: (Optional polish) Move data-testid='permissions-matrix' from the wrapping <div> onto the actual inner <table> element so the matrix wrapper itself is a real <table> per the iter-9 spec.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.trigger_school_now() awaits a 4-step pipeline synchronously inside the request — for schools with many absent teachers + AI commentary this could exceed gateway timeout. Consider firing-and-forgetting via asyncio.create_task and returning 202.

confirm-all-and-notify groups by substitute_teacher_id; if `dry_run:true` is passed it still computes the message bodies but never sends — fine, but the response always returns channel='none', status='skipped' regardless of whether Twilio is configured. Consider making dry-run explicitly emit channel='dry_run' for clarity.

scheduler.register_school_job() doesn't validate auto_sync_time format and silently falls back to 07:30 on parse error; consider returning a 400 from PUT /schools/{id} when auto_sync_time is malformed.

Carry-over from iter-7/8 (still valid): perms.py email-fallback already normalizes via .lower() — good. Members.jsx upsert flow should call serialize_doc on return; ai.py auto-from-attendance had a dead `and False` (already fixed earlier per iter-8 RCA — re-verify).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all required testids present and functional

test_credentials: Backend: pytest uses session-scoped Super Admin via /app/backend/tests/conftest.py session_token fixture. Frontend: ephemeral mongo-injected Super Admin (cleaned up post-run).
seed_data_creation: Used existing /api/seed/sri-ma-vidyalaya basic seed (school_id sch_0df9200b7a). Inserted/teardown one school_member doc with permissions=['audit.view'] per gating test; inserted/teardown one teacher 'TEST_GrantedT'; inserted/teardown two substitution rows with status='suggested' for today; transient teacher.phone='+919999999999' set then left in place (harmless). School auto_sync_* fields were reset after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter-9 backend & frontend fully verified. The Members page lives at /school/<sid>/users (NOT /members) — protected route from App.js line 63 `<Route path='users' element={<Members />}/>`. permissions-matrix testid is on a <div> wrapper, with the actual <table> nested inside. Auto-sync widget persistence requires explicit Save click — there is no auto-save on switch toggle. Twilio env keys in /app/backend/.env are intentionally blank; confirm-all-and-notify returns twilio_configured:false and notifications[].channel='none', status='skipped' but still flips suggested→confirmed in DB.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical issues found this iteration. All 4 review-request items pass end-to-end.
